untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of: (1) catalyst events (new product/turnaround announcements), (2) mutual fund sponsorship tracking and >0.5% increase measurement, and (3) news sentiment analysis negating catalyst narrative. None of these fundamental/news-based signals are available in the price/technical indicator set. The 30-day entry window from announcement and 60-day sponsorship tracking also require external event data and fund holdings data not in allowed indicators.
translation_notes: This signal is fundamentally event-driven and narrative-based, requiring access to: earnings calls, press releases, product announcements, fund holdings databases, and news sentiment analysis. The allowed indicators are purely technical/price-based and cannot capture catalyst events, sponsorship changes, or news reversals. A partial proxy was attempted using volume ratio and price reversal, but this does not capture the core logic of the rule which depends on external fundamental and institutional data sources.
